title: Neath's Love Story: Post Angkor Youth
original_title: រឿងស្នេហារបស់នេត
overview: Neath owes a lot of money to her village. Dao has fallen in love with her and helped her pay off her debt, but Neath still does not love him back. Because Dao is a womanizer. Dao tries many ways to make her fall in love with him.
